final:
module top_module(
  input [7:0] A,
  input [7:0] B,
  output reg [7:0] sum,
  output reg carry
);reg [8:0] temp_sum;

  always @ (A or B) begin
  temp_sum = A + B ;
  end

  always @ (A or B) begin
  if (temp_sum > 255) begin carry = 1 ; sum = temp_sum[7:0] ; end else begin carry = 0 ; sum = temp_sum[7:0] ; end
  end

endmodule
